name: Battistoni Golf Center
about: Battistoni Golf is a high-quality golf training facility dedicated to helping players improve their game year-round. They offer world-class golf instruction, an indoor practice facility, and Trackman Golf simulators. The venue provides a professional environment for golfers to practice, play, and receive coaching, with a focus on skill development and enjoyment of the sport.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium Trackman Golf simulators with over 80 courses
Year-round indoor practice facility available daily
Professional golf instruction from PGA professionals like Gary Battistoni and Matt Stasiak
Option to host private events and group outings

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB food allowed. Guests must bring their own plates, napkins, forks, knives, etc. as the venue does not provide these items.
BYOB alcohol allowed. Guests must bring their own cooler/Yeti/etc. with ice.

simulator_hardware.notes: Professional grade simulator hardware used for tracking and analysis.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you need to bring your own clubs to use the simulators and practice facilities.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, you can bring your own food and drinks. For beverages, you must bring your own cooler with ice. For food, you must bring your own plates, napkins, forks, and knives.

faq.question: How much time should I book for 18 holes?
faq.answer: We recommend booking one hour per person for an 18-hole round. For example, if you are playing 18 holes with a foursome, you should book 4 hours.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether the venue is kid-friendly.
